title: AAYS 114 DEM candidate classifier fresh 0015
scope: Classify AAYS 113 raster inventory rows as possible DEM/DTM versus projection/geoid grid files after 112 blocker. Read-only. No DB writes. No production deploy. No fake elevation values. This is required before rerunning 112 or declaring DEM acquisition required.
self_correction_rules: If AAYS 113 CSV is missing, report missing input and stop safely.
If raster names look like PostGIS/PROJ/geoid transformation grids, classify them as not terrain DEM.
If possible DEM candidates exist, recommend rerun of AAYS 112.
If no possible DEM candidates exist, write final blocker requiring official DEM/DTM acquisition.
